title: Bill Cracks Down
writer: Morgan Cox, Owen Francis, Dorrell McGowan
actors: Grant Withers, Beatrice Roberts, Ranny Weeks
plot: When William Reardon, a steel magnate, dies and leaves a strange will. When his spineless and dandified heir and son returns home from living in Paris, he finds "Tons' Walker, a strong and burly steel worker running the company, p...
